---
title: "Matching_algorithm"
author: "liu_weibiao"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#remotes::install_local("C:/Users/liuwe/Desktop/PsychWordVec_2023.8.tar.gz")
library(PsychWordVec)
PsychWordVec::text_model_download(c(
  "bert-base-uncased",
  "bert-base-cased",
  "bert-base-multilingual-cased"
))
```

```{r}

# 读取数据
bts <- read.csv("BTS_key_words_code_final.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)


# ---- 向量化 bts 和 tps 的 key_words ----
bts$vecs <- lapply(bts$key_words, function(x) {
  PsychWordVec::text_to_vec(
    x,
    model = "bert-base-cased",
    layers = c(0, 12)
  )$text.embed %>%
    as_embed(normalize = TRUE) %>%
    sum_wordvec()
})

```

```{r}

# 读取数据
bts
```



```{r}
tps <- read.csv("TPS_key_words_code_final.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
tps$vecs <- lapply(tps$key_words, function(x) {
  PsychWordVec::text_to_vec(
    x,
    model = "bert-base-cased",
    layers = c(0, 12)
  )$text.embed %>%
    as_embed(normalize = TRUE) %>%
    sum_wordvec()
})




```

```{r}

tps_R2 <- read.csv("R1_OUTPUT_bts_tps_target_population_matches.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
library(dplyr)

tps <- tps %>%
  anti_join(tps_R2, by = "TPS_ID")
tps


```

#BTS编号99000002匹配1个
```{r}
#剔除第一轮top5: 24030050,24030056,24030066,24030089

library(dplyr)

tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030050, 24030056, 24030066, 24030089))
tps1

# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000002)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(5)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

# ---- 查看结果 ----
print(final_results)

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results,
          "BTS_99000002_top6-10_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```

#BTS编号99000003匹配1个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049
#剔除第一轮top5: 24010018,24010112,24020044,24050119


tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049, 24010018,24010112,24020044,24050119))
tps1

# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000003)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(10)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

# ---- 查看结果 ----
print(final_results)

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results,
          "BTS_99000003_top6-15_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```

#BTS编号99000005匹配1个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054
#剔除第一轮top5: 24010126,24020023,24050107,24070059

tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24010126,24020023,24050107,24070059))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000005)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(10)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

# ---- 查看结果 ----
print(final_results)

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results,
          "BTS_99000005_top6-15_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```

#BTS编号99000009匹配2个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016
#剔除第一轮top5: 24090003,24090005,24090026,24090045,24090053


tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24090003,24090005,24090026,24090045,24090053))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000009)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(90)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1


# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000009_top6-95_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```


#BTS编号99000010匹配2个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125
#剔除第一轮top5: 24030008,24030013,24030023,24030060,24030075


tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24030008,24030013,24030023,24030060,24030075))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000010)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(190)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1


# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000010_top6-195_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```


#BTS编号99000011匹配1个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079
#剔除第一轮top5: 24010079,24040015,24040027,24040034,24050041



tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24010079,24040015,24040027,24040034,24050041))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000011)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(20)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1


# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000011_top6-25_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```


#BTS编号99000015匹配2个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083
#剔除第一轮top5: 24010045,24040013, 24050116,24090016,24090063




tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,
                        24010045,24040013, 24050116,24090016,24090063))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000015)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(10)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1


# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000015_top6-15_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```

#BTS编号99000017匹配1个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036
#剔除第一轮top5: 24020013,24070009,24070019,24070034,24090001



tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,
                        24020013,24070009,24070019,24070034,24090001))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000017)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(10)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1


# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000017_top6-15_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```

#BTS编号99000020匹配2个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022
#剔除第一轮top5: 24010030,24010118, 24040028,24050118,24050152


tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,
                        24010030,24010118, 24040028,24050118,24050152
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000020)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(30)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000020_top6-35_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```

#BTS编号99000021匹配1个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043

#剔除第一轮top5: 24010031, 24050042, 24050141, 24050161, 24070040



tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,
                        24010031, 24050042, 24050141, 24050161, 24070040
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000021)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(10)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000021_top6-15_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```

#BTS编号99000022匹配1个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069

#剔除第一轮top5: 24010077,24020018,24070020,24070024,24090025




tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,
                        24010077,24020018,24070020,24070024,24090025
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000022)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(10)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000022_top6-15_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```

#BTS编号99000023匹配2个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012

#剔除第一轮top5:24090006,24090020,24090029,24090039,24090049


tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,
                        24090006,24090020,24090029,24090039,24090049
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000023)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(50)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000023_top6-55_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```


#BTS编号99000024匹配2个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014

#剔除第一轮top5:24050085, 24050094, 24050157, 24070051,24090073



tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,
                        24050085, 24050094, 24050157, 24070051,24090073
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000024)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(300)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000024_top6-305_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```

#BTS编号99000026匹配2个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140

#剔除第一轮top5:24030088,24030097,24050145,24080025,24080034




tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,
                        24030088,24030097,24050145,24080025,24080034
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000026)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(300)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000026_top6-305_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```


#BTS编号99000029匹配2个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,

#剔除第一轮top5:24030049,24080016,24080023,24080050,24080055


tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,
                        24030049,24080016,24080023,24080050,24080055
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000029)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(300)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000029_top6-305_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```


#BTS编号99000031匹配2个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,


#剔除第一轮top5:24010007,24010073,24010081,24040033,24050126



tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,
24030089,
                        24010007,24010073,24010081,24040033,24050126
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000031)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(30)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000031_top6-35_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```

#BTS编号99000033匹配1个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,


#剔除第一轮top5: 24010037,24040004,24040036,24050100,24070081




tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,
24030089,24090043,24080022,
                        24010037,24040004,24040036,24050100,24070081
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000033)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(30)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000033_top6-35_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```

#BTS编号99000040匹配2个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,


#剔除第一轮top5: 24030108,24050015,24060008,24070033,24090054


tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,
24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,
                        24030108,24050015,24060008,24070033,24090054
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000040)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(300)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000040_top6-305_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
#最后只匹配到1个，缺1个
```

#BTS编号99000047匹配2个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013


#剔除第一轮top5: 24010075, 24020011, 24020017, 24040003, 24080028,



tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,
24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,
                        24010075, 24020011, 24020017, 24040003, 24080028
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000047)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(400)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000047_top6-405_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```


#BTS编号99000049匹配2个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060

#剔除第一轮top5: 24020034,24040019,24050142,24080002,24080061


tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,
24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,
                        24020034,24040019,24050142,24080002,24080061
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000049)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(15)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000049_top6-20_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```

#BTS编号99000052匹配1个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034


#剔除第一轮top5: 24010057,24010108,24020007,24060018




tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,
24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034,
                        24010057,24010108,24020007,24060018
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000052)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(15)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000052_top6-20_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```

#BTS编号99000053匹配1个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034,24090029,24030052

#剔除第一轮top5: 24010004,24010046,24010115,24050046


tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,
24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034,24090029,
                        24010004,24010046,24010115,24050046
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000053)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(20)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000053_top6-25_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```

#BTS编号99000054匹配1个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034,24090029,24030052,24090014,24050136,

#剔除第一轮top5: 24020032,24040020,24050114,24090072



tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,
24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034,24090029,24090014,24050136,
                       24020032,24040020,24050114,24090072
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000054)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(10)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000054_top6-15_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```

#BTS编号99000056匹配1个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034,24090029,24030052,24090014,24050136,24060022,24070039

#剔除第一轮top5: 24010135,24020052,24050158,24060003





tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,
24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034,24090029,24090014,24050136,24060022,24070039,
                       24010135,24020052,24050158,24060003
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000056)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(5)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000056_top6-10_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```

#BTS编号99000058匹配1个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034,24090029,24030052,24090014,24050136,24060022,24070039,24080024,24080035

#剔除第一轮top5: 24010039,24010084,24010131,24040057



tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034,24090029,24030052,24090014,24050136,24060022,24070039,24080024,24080035,
                       24010039,24010084,24010131,24040057
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000058)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(25)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000058_top6-30_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```

#BTS编号99000059匹配2个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24090020,24090034,24090029,24030052,24090014,24050136,24060022,24070039,24080024,24080035,24080050

#剔除第一轮top5: 24010085,24050064,24050111,24070050,24080022




tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034,24090029,24030052,24090014,24050136,24060022,24070039,24080024,24080035,24080050,
                       24010085,24050064,24050111,24070050,24080022
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000059)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(45)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000059_top6-50_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```

#BTS编号99000062匹配2个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034,24090029,24030052,24090014,24050136,24060022,24070039,24080024,24080035,24080050,24010086,24010006

#剔除第一轮top5: 24020030,24040037,24060006,24060024,24070007

tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034,24090029,24030052,24090014,24050136,24060022,24070039,24080024,24080035,24080050,24010086,24010006,
                       24020030,24040037,24060006,24060024,24070007
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000062)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(10)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000062_top6-15_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```

#BTS编号99000063匹配2个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24070001,24090029,24030052,24090014,24050136,24060022,24070039,24080024,24080035,24080050,24010086,24010006,24050044,24070051

#剔除第一轮top5: 24020008,24020047,24040001,24040009,24050108,


tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034,24090029,24030052,24090014,24050136,24060022,24070039,24080024,24080035,24080050,24010086,24010006,24050044,24070051,
                       24020008,24020047,24040001,24040009,24050108
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000063)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(300)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000063_top6-305_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```

#BTS编号99000064匹配2个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034,24090029,24030052,24090014,24050136,24060022,24070039,24080024,24080035,24080050,24010086,24010006,24050044,24070051,24040004,24030017

#剔除第一轮top5: 24090022,24090037,24090050,24090065,24090069



tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034,24090029,24030052,24090014,24050136,24060022,24070039,24080024,24080035,24080050,24010086,24010006,24050044,24070051,24040004,24030017,
                       24090022,24090037,24090050,24090065,24090069
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000064)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(300)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000064_top6-305_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```

#BTS编号99000066匹配2个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034,24090029,24030052,24090014,24050136,24060022,24070039,24080024,24080035,24080050,24010086,24010006,24050044,24070051,24040004,24030017,24050046,24050142


#剔除第一轮top5: 24090022,24090037,24090050,24090065,24090069

tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034,24090029,24030052,24090014,24050136,24060022,24070039,24080024,24080035,24080050,24010086,24010006,24050044,24070051,24040004,24030017,24050046,24050142,
                       24090022,24090037,24090050,24090065,24090069
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000066)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(45)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000066_top6-50_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```

#BTS编号99000072匹配1个
```{r}
#剔除先前匹配上的24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034,24090029,24030052,24090014,24050136,24060022,24070039,24080024,24080035,24080050,24010086,24010006,24050044,24070051,24040004,24030017,24050046,24050142,24090017,24090060

#剔除第一轮top5: 24010125,24070025,24070068,24070093,24080062




tps1 <- tps %>%
  filter(!TPS_ID %in% c(24030049,24090054,24050016,24010080, 24010125,24010103,24030079,24070083,24070033,24090036,24070022,24050094,24050043,24050069,24020012,24090016,24040014,24090077,24050140,24010084,24010112,24030043,24030089,24090043,24080022,24090039,24040013,24010060,24070001,24090020,24090034,24090029,24030052,24090014,24050136,24060022,24070039,24080024,24080035,24080050,24010086,24010006,24050044,24070051,24040004,24030017,24050046,24050142,24090017,24090060,
                       24010125,24070025,24070068,24070093,24080062
                        ))
tps1
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 目标 BTS_ID ----
target_bts_ids <- c(99000072)

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 逐个 BTS_ID 计算 Top 5 TPS ----
for (bid in target_bts_ids) {
  
  bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == bid, ]
  stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)
  
  vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]
  
  # 计算相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bid,
    TPS_ID = tps1$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(tps1$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选 Top 5
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(5)
  
  results[[as.character(bid)]] <- top5
}

# ---- 合并两个 BTS 的结果 ----
top5_similarity <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 合并 TPS 原始变量，并去掉 vecs ----
final_results <- top5_similarity %>%
  left_join(tps1, by = "TPS_ID") %>%
  select(-vecs)

R1_target_population <- read.csv("R1_target_population.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
final_results1 <- final_results %>%
  left_join(R1_target_population, by = "TPS_ID")

final_results1

# ---- 保存 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results1,
          "00BTS_99000072_top6-10_TPS.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

```

```{r}
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 只保留 BTS_ID == 99000002 ----
bts_target <- bts[bts$ID == 99000003, ]

# 确保只剩一行
stopifnot(nrow(bts_target) == 1)

vec_bts <- bts_target$vecs[[1]]

# ---- 计算该 BTS 与所有 TPS 的相似度 ----
similarities_df <- data.frame(
  BTS_ID = bts_target$ID,
  TPS_ID = tps$TPS_ID,
  Similarity = sapply(tps$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
)

# ---- 选出相似度最高的 5 篇 TPS ----
final_results <- similarities_df %>%
  arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
  head(5)

# ---- 查看结果 ----
print(final_results)

# ---- 保存为 CSV ----
write.csv(final_results, "BTS_99000002_top5_TPS.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```




```{r}
# ---- 定义余弦相似度函数 ----
cosine_similarity <- function(a, b) {
  sum(a * b) / (sqrt(sum(a * a)) * sqrt(sum(b * b)))
}

# ---- 初始化结果列表 ----
results <- list()

# ---- 用于记录已选过的 tps 行 ----
used_tps <- c()

# ---- 逐个匹配 bts 的每一行 ----
for (i in seq_len(nrow(bts))) {
  vec_bts <- bts$vecs[[i]]
  
  # 剩余未被选过的 tps
  available_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(tps)), used_tps)
  available_tps <- tps[available_idx, ]
  
  # 计算当前 bts 与所有可用 tps 的相似度
  similarities_df <- data.frame(
    BTS_ID = bts$ID[i],
    TPS_ID = available_tps$TPS_ID,
    Similarity = sapply(available_tps$vecs, function(v) cosine_similarity(vec_bts, v))
  )
  
  # 选出相似度最高的 5 个
  top5 <- similarities_df %>%
    arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
    head(5)
  
  # 保存结果
  results[[i]] <- top5
  
  # 标记已使用的 tps 行
  used_tps <- c(used_tps, available_idx[match(top5$TPS_ID, available_tps$ID)])
  
  cat("✅ 已完成匹配:", bts$ID[i], " → ", paste(top5$TPS_ID, collapse = ", "), "\n")
}

# ---- 汇总为一个长格式数据框 ----
final_results <- bind_rows(results)

# ---- 输出结果 ----
print(final_results)


write.csv(final_results, "bts_tps_top5_matches.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
